error.title: An error occurred while updating the display
error.removeChildBody: When the browser's <1>page translation</1> or some extensions rewrite the text on screen, it conflicts with this screen's updates and causes this error.<3/>Turn <5>translation off</5> for this screen and reload.
error.genericBody: An unexpected error occurred. You can recover by reloading.
error.note: Your most recent save may already be reflected on the server (check Datasets after reloading).

mermaid.renderFailed: This diagram can't be displayed (showing the source instead).
